channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: Alignment Plausibility: A New Standard for Assuring AI in Healthcare
item.description: arXiv:2607.07766v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have become significant providers of mental health support, yet they remain products of an attention economy whose operational and commercial targets favour sustained engagement over the friction that effective psychologic...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> demonstration, product, LLM, arxiv, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
item.description: Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: A Reliability Assessment of LALM Audio Judges for Full-Duplex Voice Agents
item.description: arXiv:2607.07985v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report the empirical reliability of Gemini models as audio judges that score full-duplex agent conversations directly from the raw stereo waveform, tested across three models in the Gemini family: 2.5 Flash, 3.5 Flash, and 3.1 Pro. Our primary evid...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, model, product, audio | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
